{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Malachi's realm
| introduced = The Crimson Vault
}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Malachi's realm]] is the location of the [[Naraka Incarnation]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c9">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate locations]]
[[Category:Otherworldly locations]]
